title: helicteres baruensis
intro: Helicteres baruensis is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, also known as the Baru tree. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helicteres baruensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress levels. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
